devdoc.details: Manages revenue distribution for AI Agent-generated content

OwnableInvalidOwner(address).details: The owner is not a valid owner account. (eg. `address(0)`)

OwnableUnauthorizedAccount(address).details: The caller account is not authorized to perform an operation.

batchClaimEarnings(uint256[]).details: Batch claim earnings for multiple agents

claimEarnings(uint256).details: Claim earnings for a specific agent

getAgentRevenueHistory(uint256,uint256).details: Get revenue history for an agent

getClaimableEarnings(uint256,address).details: Get claimable earnings for a specific agent and owner

getTotalClaimableEarnings(address,uint25.details: Get claimable earnings for specific agents owned by user

params.tokenIds: Array of token IDs to check

returns.total: Total claimable amount across provided tokens

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

setAgentNFT(address).details: Update the AgentNFT contract address (only owner)

setAgentWallet(uint256,address).details: Set the wallet address for an agent (where revenue will be sent)

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

devdoc.title: RevenueShare
